subcodes.first_line: As to the question of divorce, it must needs be undertaken with the cognizance of the government or other persons of influence, otherwise difficulties arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امّا مسألهٴ طلاق لابد باید باطّلاع حکومت یا معرفت ارباب نفوذ باشد و الّا محاذیر
subcodes.subjects: @law of divorce, @laws of marriage and dowry, @obedience to and respect for government authority
